top_signals.title: Russia pounds Kyiv as NATO military chief warns Moscow would 'lose a lot' by attacking Baltics
top_signals.summary: Russia and Ukraine traded their heaviest strikes in months, fueling fears of escalation and further strain on oil supplies.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Sandwich Chain Jersey Mike’s, Backers Seek $1.09 Billion in IPO
top_signals.summary: Sandwich chain Jersey Mike’s Subs Inc. and its shareholders are looking to raise as much as $1.09 billion in an initial public offering, as consumer-oriented companies join the US listing rebound.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Russia’s parliament to hold final readings on crypto bill Tuesday
top_signals.summary: Russia’s State Duma is set to consider the crypto regulation bill in second and third readings, with rules for investors and cross-border payments included.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Microsoft confirms Windows Server Update Services sync delays
top_signals.summary: Microsoft is working to fix a known issue affecting Windows Server Update Services (WSUS) servers, which has caused synchronization problems for more than a week. [...]
